ksa_text: Conduct iterative AI risk assessment across the system lifecycle, including risk identification at inception, development-stage risk updates, deployment readiness evaluation, and post-deployment risk reassessment triggered by material changes or emerging risk signals.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-011 (AI Governance) scores 0.515 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Data Platform Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI Governance KSA AG-T-011 as a discrete competency for Data Platform Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Data Platform Engineer.

decision_rationale: AI Governance is out of scope for Data Platform Engineer.
